ddls:
CREATE TABLE "design_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the asset belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category the asset belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design asset */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the asset is published or not */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the asset (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the asset in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the asset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who created the asset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who last updated the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer (e.g., UI designer, graphic designer) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the designer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the asset version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the asset version in bytes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the comment belongs to */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset that was downloaded */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who downloaded the asset */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was downloaded */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., original, preview) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_downloads_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_downloads_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the member belongs to */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who is a member of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES design_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset that was shared */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who shared the asset */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Email address of the person the asset was shared with */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_shares_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_shares_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the analytics belong to */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the asset */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the asset */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_analytics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the permission belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES design_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES design_assets ("asset_id")
)
